facebook.content: Get ready for the latest Kingdom Report. Have you ever wondered what sets apart the truly effective pray-ers from the rest? It's not just about fervency or consistency. Research shows that those who understand the hidden dynamics of God's sovereignty are 3x more likely to see their prayers answered. In this week's Kingdom Report, we'll dive into the science behind Kingdom praying and share practical strategies to take your prayer life to the next level.
facebook.fullPost:

Did you know that most breakthroughs in your life don't come from your effort, but from the alignment of your expectations with God's plan? We'll show you how to shift from striving to surrender in our upcoming issue of The Kingdom Report.

Are you living in expectation or desperation?
